response:
The report includes import tax expenditure estimations for fiscal years 2018/19, 2019/20 and 2020/21 [Source 2, page 3]. It covers customs duty, excise duty, VAT, and surtax taxes [Source 2, page 3]. Key numerical highlights regarding the import tax include:

*   2018/19: 99.3 [Source 1, page 21]
*   2019/20: 78.3 [Source 1, page 21]
*   2020/21: 120.7 [Source 1, page 21]

Additional financial data related to "Prepared food and beverages (incl. sugar)" can be found on page 19.

* Prepared food and beverages (incl. sugar) = 7,508.84 (None, 2018/19), page 19
* Prepared food and beverages (incl. sugar) = 4,438.81 (None, 2019/20), page 19
* Prepared food and beverages (incl. sugar) = 6,950.20 (None, 2020/21), page 19

Additional financial data related to percentage of total for "Prepared food and beverages (incl. sugar)" can be found on page 20.

* Prepared food and beverages (incl. sugar) = 47.7% (None, 2018/19), page 20
* Prepared food and beverages (incl. sugar) = 36.8% (None, 2019/20), page 20
